The '''jagged vibroblade''' was a variation of the standard [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]]. [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] once handed one of these weapons to a new [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] recruit.
